name: HR bereavement leave policy example
answer:
Employees receive 5 paid days of bereavement leave for an immediate family member.
Employees may carry over 20 unused vacation days into the next calendar year.
Employees receive a monthly home-office stipend.

sources.title: HR Bereavement Leave Policy
sources.content: Employees receive 5 paid days of bereavement leave for an immediate family member. Employees may carry over 5 unused vacation days into the next calendar year.
